text:
Created attachment 166918
audio/pd-osc .shar

This port is a library of external objects that handle the creation, interpretation and routing of OSC messages in Pd.

The implementation is transport agnostic allowing OSC to be sent and received via serial, TCP, UDP and possibly other transport layers.

This enables Pd to act as a controller for DAWs or for users to manipulate patches remotely/from external programs.
